summary: The diff implements all 9 requirements from the BuildRequest. REQ-1 (individual file upload progress) is implemented via fileUploadProgress state and UI display. REQ-2 (merged view toggle) and REQ-3 (view toggle tooltip) are both implemented with a single button and tooltip. REQ-4 (filename truncation) and REQ-5 (filename tooltips) are implemented with truncation classes and native title tooltips. REQ-6 (button styling with colored borders) is documented in the summary with blue/yellow borders. REQ-7 (action button tooltips) and REQ-8 (no tooltips on upload/folder buttons) are both implemented. REQ-9 (version update) is confirmed in appVersion.ts showing '0.4.143'.
